docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAXAMANA, ROGER AS TO DEFENDANT COUSENS, TED SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-25-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-26-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-07-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-25-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE OF CONTINUED STATUS CONFERENCE. HEARING SET FOR AUG-23-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-23-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-23-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED. HEARING SET FOR SEP-22-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-22-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-22-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED. HEARING SET FOR OCT-22-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-22-1993, CONTINUED TO DEC-22-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR DISMISSAL. SANCTIONS OF $25.00 IMPOSED ON PLAINTIFF ATTORNEY TO BE PAID ON OR BEFORE 12/22/93. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE TO ALL PARTIES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-22-1993, OFF CALENDAR
